lines.english: Lesson 39
lines.chinese: 第39课
lines.raw: Lesson 39 | 第39课

lines.english: Nothing to worry about
lines.chinese: 无忧无虑
lines.raw: Nothing to worry about | 无忧无虑

lines.english: What was the differnce between Bruce's behaviour and that of other people?
lines.chinese: 布鲁斯的行为与其他人的行为有什么不同？
lines.raw: What was the differnce between Bruce's behaviour and that of other people? | 布鲁斯的行为与其他人的行为有什么不同？

lines.english: The rough road across the plain soon became so bad that we tried to get Bruce to drive back to the village we had come from.
lines.chinese: 穿过平原的崎岖道路很快变得非常糟糕，以至于我们试图让布鲁斯开车回到我们来时的村庄。
lines.raw: The rough road across the plain soon became so bad that we tried to get Bruce to drive back to the village we had come from. | 穿过平原的崎岖道路很快变得非常糟糕，以至于我们试图让布鲁斯开车回到我们来时的村庄。

lines.english: Even though the road was littered with boulders and pitted with holes, Bruce was not in the least perturbed.
lines.chinese: 尽管路面上布满了巨石和坑洞，布鲁斯却丝毫没有感到不安。
lines.raw: Even though the road was littered with boulders and pitted with holes, Bruce was not in the least perturbed. | 尽管路面上布满了巨石和坑洞，布鲁斯却丝毫没有感到不安。

lines.english: Glancing at his map, he informed us that the next village was a mere twenty miles away.
lines.chinese: 他扫了一眼地图，告诉我们下一个村庄只有区区二十英里远。
lines.raw: Glancing at his map, he informed us that the next village was a mere twenty miles away. | 他扫了一眼地图，告诉我们下一个村庄只有区区二十英里远。

lines.english: It was not that Bruce always underestimated difficulties.
lines.chinese: 并不是布鲁斯总是低估困难。
lines.raw: It was not that Bruce always underestimated difficulties. | 并不是布鲁斯总是低估困难。

lines.english: He simply had no sense of danger at all.
lines.chinese: 他根本就没有危险意识。
lines.raw: He simply had no sense of danger at all. | 他根本就没有危险意识。

lines.english: No matter what the conditions were, he believed that a car should be driven as fast as it could possibly go.
lines.chinese: 无论条件如何，他都认为汽车应该尽可能快地行驶。
lines.raw: No matter what the conditions were, he believed that a car should be driven as fast as it could possibly go. | 无论条件如何，他都认为汽车应该尽可能快地行驶。

lines.english: As we bumped over the dusty track, we swerved to avoid large boulders.
lines.chinese: 当我们在尘土飞扬的小路上颠簸时，我们猛打方向盘以避开大块巨石。
lines.raw: As we bumped over the dusty track, we swerved to avoid large boulders. | 当我们在尘土飞扬的小路上颠簸时，我们猛打方向盘以避开大块巨石。

lines.english: The wheels scooped up stones which hammered ominously under the car.
lines.chinese: 车轮卷起石子，在车底下发出不祥的敲击声。
lines.raw: The wheels scooped up stones which hammered ominously under the car. | 车轮卷起石子，在车底下发出不祥的敲击声。

lines.english: We felt sure that sooner or later a stone would rip a hole in our petrol tank or damage the engine.
lines.chinese: 我们确信迟早会有石子把我们的油箱撕开一个洞或者损坏发动机。
lines.raw: We felt sure that sooner or later a stone would rip a hole in our petrol tank or damage the engine. | 我们确信迟早会有石子把我们的油箱撕开一个洞或者损坏发动机。

lines.english: Because of this, we kept looking back, wondering if we were leaving a trail of oil and petrol behind us.
lines.chinese: 因此，我们不停地回头看，想知道我们是否在身后留下了一串油迹和汽油。
lines.raw: Because of this, we kept looking back, wondering if we were leaving a trail of oil and petrol behind us. | 因此，我们不停地回头看，想知道我们是否在身后留下了一串油迹和汽油。

lines.english: What a relief it was when the boulders suddenly disappeared,
lines.chinese: 当巨石突然消失时，我们松了一口气，
lines.raw: What a relief it was when the boulders suddenly disappeared, | 当巨石突然消失时，我们松了一口气，

lines.english: giving way to a stretch of plain where the only obstacles were clumps bushes.
lines.chinese: 取而代之的是一片平坦的开阔地，那里唯一的障碍物是灌木丛。
lines.raw: giving way to a stretch of plain where the only obstacles were clumps bushes. | 取而代之的是一片平坦的开阔地，那里唯一的障碍物是灌木丛。

lines.english: But there was worse to come. Just ahead of us there was a huge fissure.
lines.chinese: 但更糟糕的还在后面。就在我们前方，有一道巨大的裂缝。
lines.raw: But there was worse to come. Just ahead of us there was a huge fissure. | 但更糟糕的还在后面。就在我们前方，有一道巨大的裂缝。

lines.english: In response to renewed pleadings, Bruce stopped.
lines.chinese: 布鲁斯响应我们再次的恳求，停了下来。
lines.raw: In response to renewed pleadings, Bruce stopped. | 布鲁斯响应我们再次的恳求，停了下来。

lines.english: Though we all got out to examine the fissure, he remained in the car.
lines.chinese: 尽管我们都下车检查裂缝，他却仍然待在车里。
lines.raw: Though we all got out to examine the fissure, he remained in the car. | 尽管我们都下车检查裂缝，他却仍然待在车里。

lines.english: We informed him that the fissure extended for fifty yards and was two feet wide and four feet deep.
lines.chinese: 我们告诉他，那道裂缝绵延五十码，宽两英尺，深四英尺。
lines.raw: We informed him that the fissure extended for fifty yards and was two feet wide and four feet deep. | 我们告诉他，那道裂缝绵延五十码，宽两英尺，深四英尺。

lines.english: Even this had no effect.
lines.chinese: 即使这样也毫无作用。
lines.raw: Even this had no effect. | 即使这样也毫无作用。

lines.english: Bruce went into a low gear and drove at a terrifying speed,
lines.chinese: 布鲁斯挂入低档，以惊人的速度行驶，
lines.raw: Bruce went into a low gear and drove at a terrifying speed, | 布鲁斯挂入低档，以惊人的速度行驶，

lines.english: keeping the front wheels astride the crack as he followed its zigzag course.
lines.chinese: 让前轮跨过裂缝，沿着它之字形的路线前进。
lines.raw: keeping the front wheels astride the crack as he followed its zigzag course. | 让前轮跨过裂缝，沿着它之字形的路线前进。

lines.english: Before we had time to worry about what might happen, we were back on the plain again.
lines.chinese: 还没等我们有时间担心会发生什么，我们又回到了平原上。
lines.raw: Before we had time to worry about what might happen, we were back on the plain again. | 还没等我们有时间担心会发生什么，我们又回到了平原上。

lines.english: Bruce consulted the map once more and told us that the village was now only fifteen miles away.
lines.chinese: 布鲁斯又一次查阅了地图，告诉我们村庄现在只剩下十五英里远了。
lines.raw: Bruce consulted the map once more and told us that the village was now only fifteen miles away. | 布鲁斯又一次查阅了地图，告诉我们村庄现在只剩下十五英里远了。

lines.english: Our next obstacle was a shallow pool of water about half a mile across.
lines.chinese: 我们的下一个障碍是一个大约半英里宽的浅水池。
lines.raw: Our next obstacle was a shallow pool of water about half a mile across. | 我们的下一个障碍是一个大约半英里宽的浅水池。

lines.english: Bruce charged at it, but in the middle, the car came to a grinding halt.
lines.chinese: 布鲁斯冲了过去，但在水池中央，汽车嘎然而止。
lines.raw: Bruce charged at it, but in the middle, the car came to a grinding halt. | 布鲁斯冲了过去，但在水池中央，汽车嘎然而止。

lines.english: A yellow light on the dashboard flashed angrily and Bruce cheerfully announced that there was no oil in the engine!
lines.chinese: 仪表盘上一个黄灯愤怒地闪烁着，布鲁斯却高兴地宣布发动机里没油了！
lines.raw: A yellow light on the dashboard flashed angrily and Bruce cheerfully announced that there was no oil in the engine! | 仪表盘上一个黄灯愤怒地闪烁着，布鲁斯却高兴地宣布发动机里没油了！
